# Privacy Act 2020

Jurisdiction: New Zealand
Region: NZ
Citation: Privacy Act 2020
Authority: New Zealand Legislation / Privacy Commissioner
Source URL: https://www.legislation.govt.nz/act/public/2020/0031/latest/LMS23223.html
Topics: notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, cross_border_transfer, retention_deletion, security_breach, data_minimization, accountability
Keywords: New Zealand Privacy Act, information privacy principles, IPP, notifiable privacy breach, overseas disclosure, 新西兰

## Summary
New Zealand privacy law with information privacy principles, access and correction rights, notifiable privacy breach duties, and overseas disclosure restrictions.

## Key compliance obligations
- Collect personal information for lawful, necessary purposes and generally from the individual.
- Tell individuals why information is collected and who will receive it.
- Protect information and avoid keeping it longer than required.
- Notify notifiable privacy breaches and meet overseas disclosure requirements.
